name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve

---

Before submitting a bug report, please read the instructions below:
    1. Make sure you are using the latest version of the resource pack. If not, update it and check if the issue persists.
    2. Check the “Important” section on the project page — your issue might already be listed there.

If everything above is fine, please follow this report format:
    1. Delete this text before submitting your report.
    2. Specify the version of Minecraft you are playing on.
    3. Mention whether you are using ETF or similar mods.
    4. Describe the issue in as much detail as possible.

We would also like to sincerely thank you for your feedback. Even if the issue turns out to be invalid, your effort to help is greatly appreciated!
